framework.name: TLS Security Recommendations
framework.name_nl: Recommandations de securite relatives a TLS
framework.issuing_body: Agence nationale de la securite des systemes d'information (ANSSI)
framework.scope: Technical recommendations for secure TLS deployment on servers and clients
framework.structure_description: Recommendations covering TLS version selection, cipher suite configuration, certificate management, HSTS, OCSP stapling, and client authentication.

controls.title: Enforce TLS 1.2 minimum
controls.description: Disable SSLv2, SSLv3, TLS 1.0, and TLS 1.1. Only allow TLS 1.2 and TLS 1.3.
controls.description_nl: Desactiver SSLv2, SSLv3, TLS 1.0 et TLS 1.1. N'autoriser que TLS 1.2 et TLS 1.3.

controls.title: Prefer TLS 1.3
controls.description: Configure servers to prefer TLS 1.3 which provides improved security and performance over TLS 1.2.
controls.description_nl: Configurer les serveurs pour privilegier TLS 1.3 qui offre une securite et des performances ameliorees par rapport a TLS 1.2.

controls.title: Restrict cipher suites
controls.description: Only allow cipher suites providing forward secrecy (ECDHE/DHE) with AEAD encryption (GCM, CCM, ChaCha20-Poly1305).
controls.description_nl: N'autoriser que les suites de chiffrement offrant la confidentialite persistante (ECDHE/DHE) avec chiffrement AEAD (GCM, CCM, ChaCha20-Poly1305).

controls.title: Disable weak cipher suites
controls.description: Disable RC4, DES, 3DES, CBC-mode ciphers, export-grade ciphers, and NULL ciphers.
controls.description_nl: Desactiver RC4, DES, 3DES, chiffrements en mode CBC, chiffrements de qualite export et chiffrements NULL.

controls.title: Use strong key exchange parameters
controls.title_nl: Utiliser des parametres d'echange de cles robustes
controls.description: Use ECDHE with P-256 or P-384 curves, or DHE with groups of at least 2048 bits.
controls.description_nl: Utiliser ECDHE avec les courbes P-256 ou P-384, ou DHE avec des groupes d'au moins 2048 bits.

controls.title: Certificate key requirements
controls.description: Use RSA keys of at least 2048 bits (4096 recommended) or ECDSA keys with P-256 or P-384.
controls.description_nl: Utiliser des cles RSA d'au moins 2048 bits (4096 recommande) ou des cles ECDSA avec P-256 ou P-384.

controls.title: Certificate chain validation
controls.title_nl: Validation de la chaine de certificats
controls.description: Clients shall validate the full certificate chain including intermediate certificates and revocation status.
controls.description_nl: Les clients doivent valider la chaine de certificats complete incluant les certificats intermediaires et le statut de revocation.

controls.title: Enable HSTS
controls.description: Deploy HTTP Strict Transport Security with a minimum max-age of 6 months and includeSubDomains.
controls.description_nl: Deployer HTTP Strict Transport Security avec un max-age minimum de 6 mois et includeSubDomains.

controls.title: Enable OCSP stapling
controls.description: Enable OCSP stapling to improve certificate revocation checking performance and privacy.
controls.description_nl: Activer l'agrafage OCSP pour ameliorer les performances et la confidentialite de la verification de revocation des certificats.

controls.title: Disable renegotiation or use secure renegotiation
controls.title_nl: Desactiver la renegociation ou utiliser la renegociation securisee
controls.description: Disable client-initiated renegotiation. If renegotiation is needed, use RFC 5746 secure renegotiation.
controls.description_nl: Desactiver la renegociation initiee par le client. Si la renegociation est necessaire, utiliser la renegociation securisee RFC 5746.

controls.title: Disable TLS compression
controls.description: Disable TLS compression to prevent CRIME and BREACH attacks.
controls.description_nl: Desactiver la compression TLS pour prevenir les attaques CRIME et BREACH.

controls.title: Certificate transparency
controls.description: Monitor Certificate Transparency logs for unauthorized certificate issuance for your domains.
controls.description_nl: Surveiller les journaux de Certificate Transparency pour detecter l'emission de certificats non autorises pour vos domaines.
